fields.label: Integration Point
fields.options:
Order Placement
Listing Visibility
Payment Processing
Buybox Eligibility
Commission Rate
Account Status
Tier Evaluation
Notification Trigger
fields.description: The system integration point where this rule applies

fields.label: Action Type
fields.options:
Block
Warn
Limit
Boost
Discount
Notify
Escalate
Log
fields.description: Type of action to take when rule conditions are met

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this integration rule is currently active

fields.label: Score Condition
fields.description: Condition expression to evaluate (e.g., score < threshold, health_status == 'Critical')

fields.label: Score Threshold Min
fields.description: Minimum score threshold for this rule to trigger

fields.label: Score Threshold Max
fields.description: Maximum score threshold for this rule to trigger

fields.label: Action Value
fields.description: Value or configuration for the action (e.g., discount percentage, notification template, limit amount)
